name: Grilled Salmon
instructions: Marinate salmon with lemon, garlic, olive oil, salt, and pepper
Grill salmon for 4–5 minutes per side until cooked through

name: Tacos
instructions: Cook ground beef with taco seasoning
Warm tortillas
Assemble tacos with beef, lettuce, tomato, cheese, and sour cream

name: Cheeseburger
instructions: Form and grill beef patty
Toast bun
Assemble burger with patty, cheese, lettuce, tomato, onion, and ketchup

name: Spaghetti
instructions: Boil noodles
Cook beef with garlic and onion
Stir in tomato sauce
Serve over noodles

name: Mac and Cheese
instructions: Boil macaroni
Melt cheese with milk and butter
Combine and stir

name: Pancakes
instructions: Mix batter with egg and milk
Cook on skillet until golden brown
Serve with butter and syrup

name: Fried Chicken
instructions: Marinate chicken in buttermilk
Coat in seasoned flour
Fry in hot oil until crispy and cooked through

name: Shrimp Alfredo
instructions: Cook shrimp in butter and garlic
Prepare Alfredo sauce with cream and parmesan
Toss with cooked fettuccine

name: Steak and Potatoes
instructions: Season steak and cook to desired doneness
Roast or mash potatoes with butter and garlic
Serve together with parsley garnish

name: Gumbo
instructions: Make a dark roux
Cook vegetables and meats together
Simmer with spices and serve over rice
